standard.label: AlloFlow 5322 source, blueprint, feedback, learning, case-study, safety, dignity, and linkage QA v1
standard.limitation: Not ETS or AAIDD approval; independent intellectual-disabilities educator, self-advocate, family, AAC, assistive-technology, health, transition, legal, cultural-linguistic, and psychometric validation remain pending.

expansion.method: The assistant reviewed structure and answer derivation across all activities and conducted a cross-domain qualitative sample. Normalized answer-set, rationale, and reference reuse was counted as one source content kernel. The 300 transformations are approved as guided practice only, not as independent exam items.
